items.name: AWS Activate
items.blurb: Amazon program providing AWS service credits and support to early-stage and funded startups.

items.name: Google Cloud for Startups
items.blurb: Google program offering GCP credits to startups at various stages from seed to Series A+.

items.name: Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub
items.blurb: Microsoft program offering Azure credits, GitHub, and software benefits to early-stage startups.

items.name: Stripe Atlas
items.blurb: Stripe service that incorporates a US company, sets up a bank account, and issues equity documents.

items.name: Notion for Startups
items.blurb: Notion's startup program offering discounted or free Plus plan access to early-stage companies.

items.name: HubSpot for Startups
items.blurb: HubSpot program providing CRM and marketing software at a discount for eligible seed-stage startups.

items.name: Segment Startup Program
items.blurb: Twilio Segment program offering customer data platform credits to qualifying early-stage startups.

items.name: Airtable for Startups
items.blurb: Airtable startup program offering discounted access to its database and workflow platform.

items.name: Intercom Early Stage
items.blurb: Intercom program offering discounted customer messaging platform access to early-stage startups.

items.name: GitHub for Startups
items.blurb: GitHub program giving eligible startups free access to GitHub Team for their entire organization.

items.name: Brex for Startups
items.blurb: Corporate card and banking platform built for startups with no personal guarantee required.

items.name: Salesforce for Startups
items.blurb: Salesforce program offering CRM credits and resources to early-stage venture-backed startups.

items.name: Freshworks for Startups
items.blurb: Freshworks startup program offering CRM and support software credits to qualifying companies.

items.name: Cloudflare for Startups
items.blurb: Cloudflare program providing service credits to startups accepted through partner accelerators.

items.name: MongoDB for Startups
items.blurb: MongoDB Atlas credit program for early-stage startups to build on its cloud database platform.
